name: AxioScan 7 - MFB 7-chunk (with <section>)
description: AxioScan 7 / MFB whole-slide batch where the filename carries an explicit <section> chunk between sample_short and stain (7 underscore chunks). Mirrors the 2026-05-22 day-folder convention captured in tools/configs/axioscan7_20260522.yaml: MFB_<operator>_<project>_<sample_short>_<section>_<stain>_<magnification>.czi (e.g. MFB_AUA_1022_ID58T_1_Hif1A_10x.czi). Pick this recipe, point at the day folder, preview, ingest.

overrides.registry.notes: MFB AxioScan 7 WSI batch (${discovered.stain} stain, section ${discovered.section}, ${discovered.czi_objective_mag}x NA${discovered.czi_objective_na})
